summary: No concrete details on audio or performance; reviewer urges release of the hidden vault tapes.
review: The lone comment notes that security at Radio City was unusually tight and suggests an amazing set of tapes may be sitting in the vault, pleading for them to be released. No information is provided about recording source, sound quality, setlist, or individual performances, so the merits of this release remain undefined.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review with no concrete assessment of sound or show quality; the comment is enthusiastic about a potential tape but provides no evaluative data.
